name: goal-loop-skills
description: Codex skills for designing and auditing goal, loop, research, execution, and review prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Design and audit Codex goal prompts
interface.longDescription: A pair of reusable Codex skills for turning rough task intent into launch-ready goal prompts and auditing existing goal or loop prompts before execution.
defaultPrompt: Use goal-loop-architect to build a launch-ready goal prompt.
Use goal-loop-auditor to audit this goal prompt before launch.
